description_long: This rifle features a dark metallic body with a unique, menacing design, incorporating organic, claw-like appendages extending from the front of the barrel. The main receiver and stock are robust, with a matte finish and subtle red accents along the body, giving it a futuristic and aggressive appearance. The magazine is curved and detachable, typical of modern assault rifles, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The front end is adorned with two large, curved, talon-like blades, suggesting a hybrid between a firearm and a melee weapon. The rear stock is solid and angular, providing stability, while the top rail appears to lack any advanced optics, relying on basic iron sights. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and synthetic materials, with a focus on both intimidation and functionality.
description: A dark, metallic rifle with claw-like blades at the front, red accents, and a curved magazine, blending futuristic and organic design elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the twin curved claw blades extending outward, with the barrel and iron sights visible above the claws.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the full length of the rifle, the curved magazine, ergonomic grip, and the aggressive talon-like front appendages.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid stock, the back of the receiver, and the symmetrical alignment of the claws and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left profile, showing the magazine, grip, and the detailed structure of the front claws.
